title: quercus steenisii
intro: Quercus steenisii, also known as the Sumatran oak or Steenis oak, is a species of deciduous tree native to Indonesia, particularly in Sumatra and Java. The bark of Quercus steenisii has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including antioxidant, antiviral, and antifungal properties, making it useful in treating various ailments such as fever, cough, and skin infections. In herbal preparations, Quercus steenisii bark is often combined with other plants to create teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to promote overall well-being and to support the immune system.
